рҹҺҶрҹҮәрҹҮё The countdown is ON! рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҺҶ

Join us for our 5th Annual Fireworks Celebration at GaryвҖҷs Family Resort on Sunday, July 5th! рҹҺҮ

рҹ•ҳ Fireworks begin at 9:45 PM вҖ” but come early for an evening packed with fun!

рҹҺ¶ Live Music
рҹҢҪ Corn Hole
вӣі 27 Holes of Mini Golf
рҹӘӮ Zip Lining (until sundown)
рҹҚ” Grab dinner at the Jiffy Pup
рҹҚҝ Snack Stand featuring cotton candy, hot dogs, freshly popped movie theater popcorn, and more!

рҹҡ— Please arrive early for parking and to enjoy all the entertainment before fireworks light up the sky!

рҹҺү GIVEAWAY TIME! рҹҺү
Share this post and youвҖҷll be entered into a drawing to win ONE FREE Jiffy Pup combo OR ONE FREE specialty ice cream (which includes Banana Splits, Sundaes, Milkshakes, etc)! рҹҚ”рҹҚҢрҹҚЁ

рҹҸҶ The winner can redeem their prize anytime during the remainder of the 2026 season!

Whether youвҖҷre staying with us or just stopping by for the evening, everyone is welcome! Bring your family, your friends, and your lawn chairsвҖ”we canвҖҷt wait to celebrate with you! вқӨпёҸрҹӨҚрҹ’ҷ

For more information, visit https://garysfamilyresort.com

рҹ“Ј Share this post, tag your friends, and help us make our 5th Annual Fireworks Celebration our biggest one yet!
